title: When Everything Still Felt New
description: A little boat ride, two bright life jackets, and the kind of smiles that made the beginning of us unforgettable.

title: The Garden Photoshoot
description: You in the warm afternoon light, patiently sitting for one more picture while an ordinary garden became part of our story.

title: The Friend You Made in Five Minutes
description: A tiny kitten found you, and your gentle heart immediately knew exactly how to make it feel safe.

title: Lunch Across the Table
description: One bowl of noodles, your face across from mine, and another everyday lunch that became precious simply because it was with you.

title: Made by Hand, Shared by Heart
description: Folding dinner together, learning as we went, and turning a kitchen table into one of my favorite places.

title: The Tower Between Us
description: One ordinary night, one increasingly impossible tower, and your smile making the smallest game feel like a favorite memory.

title: Your Voice Filling the Room
description: Just you talking, smiling, and making the whole room feel alive in the way only you can.

title: Your Turn at the Table
description: A quick game of pool and another reminder that the best dates are the ones where we get to be playful together.

title: Winter Train, Warm Company
description: Bundled up beside the window, making even a quiet train ride feel like somewhere I wanted to stay.

title: A Handful of Trust
description: Pigeons gathering around your hand and that bright smile appearing when one finally came close.

title: A New Friend on New Year's Day
description: The year began with a temple path, a friendly orange cat, and the kindness you carry everywhere.

title: Following You Through Red Gates
description: Up the old stone steps and through the red gates, following you into another small adventure together.

title: Firelight and Familiar Smiles
description: A barbecue, a cool evening, and you tending the grill while life felt wonderfully simple.

title: Love in the Everyday
description: Watching you turn a simple moment in the kitchen into one more scene I want to remember.

title: Taste-Test Approved
description: You tasting our work in the kitchen—the most important review from my favorite person.

title: The Gentlest Afternoon
description: You, a curious rabbit, and the quiet kindness you bring everywhere you go.

title: A Match Made of Laughter
description: A badminton court, determined swings, and the playful energy that makes every date with you memorable.

title: Small Wishes at the Koi Pond
description: Bright koi circling below us while we shared one more peaceful pause in the middle of an adventure.

title: The Little Things We Made
description: Ink, paper, patient hands, and the quiet happiness of making something small together.

title: Side by Side at the Stove
description: A pan on the stove, our hands working together, and another ordinary evening that already felt like home.

title: A Wish by Candlelight
description: A birthday cake, glowing candles, and the beautiful face I always want to celebrate.

title: The Laugh I Never Want to Lose
description: A wonderfully silly moment that still makes me smile—the kind of joy that has always felt like us.

title: Our Arcade Date
description: Lights flashing, buttons clicking, and both of us completely committed to one very important pinball game.

title: Holding On
description: Even the smallest touch can say it: I am here, you are safe, and we are in this life together.

title: A Small Autumn Treasure
description: You in the sunshine, holding a giant pinecone like a little souvenir from an ordinary day together.

title: The Most Important Air-Hockey Match
description: Fast hands, playful competition, and the kind of date where winning mattered much less than laughing together.

title: Your Gentle Hello
description: You stopping to greet a sweet old dog, because tenderness follows you into every ordinary street.

title: A Very Serious Beauty Session
description: A little skincare, a lot of laughter, and one wonderfully unserious evening together.

title: The Smile Before Sleep
description: A quiet conversation, your head on the pillow, and the smile I could happily end every day beside.

title: Laughter Around the Table
description: Food, friends, familiar voices, and your smile turning a shared table into a place of belonging.

title: Bunny Ears and Stepping Stones
description: Following you across the stones, bunny ears and all, on one last playful adventure before the year ended.
